title: tui /cat command reads arbitrary filesystem paths with no traversal check
description: /cat handler in tui/src/event.rs (lines 1127-1146) passes the user-supplied argument directly to std::path::Path::new() with no validation, then reads and broadcasts the file contents to all room participants. Any path the TUI process can read (including ~/.ssh/id_ed25519, identity.key, daemon.token) can be exfiltrated to the entire chat room. cli/src/commands.rs has safe_name() for this purpose but it is not used here.
